scripts.validate:app-visibility: test -f _site/index.html && test -f _site/apps.html && ! rg -q 'data-app="coil"' _site/index.html _site/apps.html && rg -q 'data-app="bench"' _site/index.html && rg -q 'data-app="dial"' _site/index.html && rg -q 'data-app="bench"' _site/apps.html && rg -q 'data-app="dial"' _site/apps.html && test -f _site/coil.html && rg -q 'mailto:hello@zentsu.app' _site/coil.html && test -f _site/coil/privacy.html && rg -q '<link rel="canonical" href="https://zentsu.app/coil/privacy"' _site/coil/privacy.html
scripts.validate:sitemap: test -f _site/sitemap.xml && ! rg -q '/pages/' _site/sitemap.xml && test "$(rg -c '<loc>https://zentsu.app/' _site/sitemap.xml)" = "$(rg -c '<loc>' _site/sitemap.xml)" && rg -q '<loc>https://zentsu.app/dial/</loc>' _site/sitemap.xml && rg -q '<link rel="canonical" href="https://zentsu.app/dial/"' _site/dial/index.html && test -f _site/_redirects && rg -q '^/dial.html /dial/ 301$' _site/_redirects
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run validate:html && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:app-visibility && npm run validate:sitemap && npm run validate:bench-accessibility && npm run validate:site
